name: chrome_search
description: 在 Chrome 浏览器中打开 Google 搜索指定关键词。自动检测系统类型（macOS/Windows/Linux）并打开 Chrome。
source_code:
def chrome_search(query: str, **kwargs) -> str:
    import urllib.parse
    import subprocess
    import platform
    
    encoded_query = urllib.parse.quote(query)
    url = f"https://www.google.com/search?q={encoded_query}"
    
    try:
        system = platform.system()
        if system == "Darwin":  # macOS
            subprocess.run(["open", "-a", "Google Chrome", url], timeout=5)
        elif system == "Windows":
            subprocess.run(["start", "chrome", url], shell=True, timeout=5)
        else:  # Linux
            subprocess.run(["google-chrome", url], timeout=5)
        
        return f"✅ 已在 Chrome 中搜索: {query}"
    except Exception as e:
        return f"❌ 搜索失败: {str(e)}"
